# VDAF draft-18 test vectors

Official CFRG test vectors for draft-irtf-cfrg-vdaf-18, fetched verbatim from
[`cfrg/draft-irtf-cfrg-vdaf`](https://github.com/cfrg/draft-irtf-cfrg-vdaf)
at tag `draft-irtf-cfrg-vdaf-18`, commit
`acd6786c5755c476fc0b76ca6a9ab89b8277d0c0`, path `test_vec/`.

The vectors are generated by the draft's reference implementation
(`poc/vdaf_poc/`, `VERSION = 18`). Note the document version constant stays 18
at the `draft-irtf-cfrg-vdaf-19` tag as well: -19 contains no wire-breaking
changes, so these vectors remain authoritative for both drafts.

## Files

| File | What it exercises |
|------|--------------------|
| `Prio3Count_0.json` | 2 aggregators, 1 report |
| `Prio3Count_1.json` | 3 aggregators, 1 report |
| `Prio3Count_2.json` | 2 aggregators, 5 reports, agg_result 3 |
| `Prio3Count_bad_gadget_poly.json` | negative: corrupted gadget polynomial must fail verification |
| `Prio3Count_bad_helper_seed.json` | negative: corrupted helper seed must fail verification |
| `Prio3Count_bad_meas_share.json` | negative: corrupted measurement share must fail verification |
| `Prio3Count_bad_wire_seed.json` | negative: corrupted wire seed must fail verification |
| `XofTurboShake128.json` | XofTurboShake128 derive_seed + expand_into_vec KAT |

The negative vectors carry an `operations` trace whose entries name the exact
operation expected to fail (`success: false`); tests must assert the failure
happens at that step, not merely that the flow errors somewhere.

## Schema notes (differences from the draft-14 vectors under ../vdaf)

- `prep` renamed to `reports`
- `prep_shares` renamed to `verifier_shares`, `prep_messages` to `verifier_messages`
- `out_shares` entries are one flat hex string per aggregator (draft-14 nested
  per-element arrays)
- new `operations` array: an execution trace with per-step `success` flags

## Refreshing

    SHA=acd6786c5755c476fc0b76ca6a9ab89b8277d0c0
    gh api "repos/cfrg/draft-irtf-cfrg-vdaf/contents/test_vec/vdaf/<FILE>.json?ref=$SHA" \
      --jq .content | base64 -d > testdata/fixtures/vdaf18/<FILE>.json
